title: Senior Software Engineer - Unisys India Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Unisys India Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Unisys India Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Chennai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Unisys India Holdings Services:
Unisys India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India Holdings Services!
